mapper.select: SELECT id, auto_backup_enabled AS autoBackupEnabled, backup_cron AS backupCron, backup_type AS backupType, retention_days AS retentionDays, encrypt_enabled AS encryptEnabled, notify_on_failure AS notifyOnFailure, storage_path AS storagePath, storage_warning_threshold AS storageWarningThreshold, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM backup_strategies WHERE status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE backup_strategies SET auto_backup_enabled = #{autoBackupEnabled}, backup_cron = #{backupCron}, backup_type = #{backupType}, retention_days = #{retentionDays}, encrypt_enabled = #{encryptEnabled}, notify_on_failure = #{notifyOnFailure}, storage_path = #{storagePath}, storage_warning_threshold = #{storageWarningThreshold}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
